description: Dirt path — the RPG Tiles Vector pack's opaque 64px dirt fill (public/assets/tilemaps/rpg-terrain.png, the pure-brown centre block at cols 8-9, rows 0-1). Soft-shaded cobbled dirt authored into the raster, scaled at native resolution so a worn road reads with depth, matching the grass. The 2×2 field varies the road instead of repeating one cell.
